prompts.title: Quarterly Strategy Plan
prompts.use_case: Plan content strategy for next quarter
prompts.prompt: Create a Q[X] content strategy for [COMPANY]. Goals: [GOALS]. Audience: [AUDIENCE]. Current strengths: [STRENGTHS]. Recommend: (1) 3 content pillars, (2) Posting frequency per platform, (3) Content mix (%), (4) Key campaigns, (5) Success metrics.

prompts.title: Niche Market Positioning
prompts.use_case: Position company in specific market niche
prompts.prompt: Help position [COMPANY] in [NICHE] market. Current position: [POSITION]. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Competitors: [COMPETITORS]. Recommend: (1) Unique angle, (2) Message framework, (3) Content topics that own this niche, (4) Differentiation tactics.

prompts.title: Customer Acquisition Funnel
prompts.prompt: Design customer acquisition funnel for [COMPANY]. Stage: [AWARENESS/CONSIDERATION/DECISION]. Recommend: (1) Content strategy per stage, (2) Platform focus, (3) CTAs, (4) Nurture sequence, (5) Conversion tactics.

prompts.title: Crisis Communication Plan
prompts.use_case: Prepare for negative publicity or crisis
prompts.prompt: Create crisis communication plan for [COMPANY] in [SCENARIO]. Prepare: (1) Holding statement, (2) Key messages, (3) Q&A responses, (4) Post schedule adjustment, (5) Community engagement approach.

prompts.title: Partnership & Collaboration Strategy
prompts.prompt: Identify partnership opportunities for [COMPANY]. Target audience: [AUDIENCE]. Recommend: (1) 5 ideal partnership types, (2) How to approach, (3) Content collaboration ideas, (4) Cross-promotion tactics, (5) Measurement approach.
